      "text": "Tad mettehß tas Keh-

    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninisch atbilde-

irr teefcham teefi/ ka juhtu Deetws 
weenãs Deetws irr pahr wiſfeem

"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad pa-augstinaja tas

n eezehle to par Walditaju pahr 
viffu Babeles Walstibu/ un par

"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad luhdse Dantjels to

"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "As Kehninisch Nebukad- 
Nezars darrija weenu 
Bildi no Selta/ furra 
Augstums bĳa feſchdefinitis Oh-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehninisch Nebu-

nas-Kungus/ Junkurus/ un wiſ-

"

    {
      "n": 3,

      "text": "Tad fanahze tee Leelt-Kun- 
gt/ Walditaji/ Semmes-Soh- 
gi/ Teefas-Kungi/ Uusrangi/ Run-

"

    {
      "n": 4,

      "text": "Un tas Jstanzejs tsfanze
